steps.t: Daervunn fights on the south-eastern edge of the eastern slag hill.
Lothrandir is shouting words of support and guidance to the men of the line on the eastern side of the battle.
You hear the battle-cries of Gimli the Dwarf coming from the north-eastern side of the eastern slag hill.
Legolas fights alongside Gimli on the north-eastern side of the eastern slag hill.
Lines of archers fire into the enemy ranks from their position on the slag hills. Look for full quivers by the bodies of men who have fallen, and gath…
Legolas fights alongside Gimli on the north-eastern side of the eastern slag hill. You collected a number of full quivers to return to Legolas.
Aragorn is atop the eastern slag hill.
Prince Imrahil is hard-pressed on the slopes of the western slag hill, before the Black Gate. Aragorn has asked you to fight your way across the battl…
